title: More Runes [More Magic Series]
description: More runes to cast your spells!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
Runes
### Strongly recommended
Roughly Enough Items - to see the many recipes!
# ✨ Features

This mod adds new Runes and ways to obtain them.

Runes are magical item that permit you to cast spell of the corresponding elements.

This mod is used as dependency in many of the [More Magic Series]
# ⚡️ Getting started
 
Runes have shapeless recipes, can be crafted in hand or at a regular crafting table.

All runes have the same recipe on the Rune Crafting Altar, but provide more runes for the same amount of ingredients.

The list is:

- Blood rune
- Corruption rune
- Nature rune
- Sound rune
- Water rune
- Wind rune
